description: Dark / Light Mode — Add user-controllable light mode (Warm Paper palette) with manual toggle, OS preference detection, flash prevention, and localStorage persistence across sessions.

userStories.title: Define CSS custom properties for both themes
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to define CSS variables for all color tokens so that Tailwind utilities can reference theme-appropriate values.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `:root` block with light mode (Warm Paper) RGB triplet values for all 12 color tokens: --color-bg (250 250 248), --color-bg-surface (240 237 232), --color-bg-subtle (232 228 221), --color-stroke (212 207 200), --color-stroke-muted (232 228 221), --color-fg (26 24 20), --color-fg-muted (107 101 96), --color-accent-blue (192 122 58), --color-accent-green (45 122 58), --color-accent-purple (124 92 191), --color-accent-yellow (160 96 16), --color-accent-red (192 57 43)

Create `.dark` class block with dark mode (GitHub Dark) RGB triplet values for all 12 color tokens: --color-bg (13 17 23), --color-bg-surface (22 27 34), --color-bg-subtle (33 38 45), --color-stroke (48 54 61), --color-stroke-muted (33 38 45), --color-fg (230 237 243), --color-fg-muted (139 148 158), --color-accent-blue (88 166 255), --color-accent-green (63 185 80), --color-accent-purple (188 140 255), --color-accent-yellow (210 153 34), --color-accent-red (248 81 73)
Replace existing `body` rule in global.css with: `body { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; background: rgb(var(--color-bg)); color: rgb(var(--color-fg)); margin: 0; }`
CSS validates without errors
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Configure Tailwind to use CSS variables
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to remap Tailwind color tokens to CSS variables so all existing utilities continue to work without component changes.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `darkMode: 'class'` to top-level tailwind.config.mjs (alongside content, theme, plugins)

Update all 12 color values in theme.extend.colors to use `rgb(var(--color-*) / <alpha-value>)` format: bg, bg-surface, bg-subtle, stroke, stroke-muted, fg, fg-muted, accent-blue, accent-green, accent-purple, accent-yellow, accent-red
Verify existing Tailwind utilities (bg-bg, text-fg, border-stroke, etc.) generate correct CSS with rgb(var(...))
Verify opacity modifiers work (bg-bg/80 generates valid rgba with alpha channel)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement flash-prevention script
userStories.description: As a user, I want the page to load in my preferred theme immediately without any flash of incorrect colors.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `<meta name="color-scheme" content="light dark">` to `<head>` in Base.astro immediately after `<meta charset="utf-8">`

Add inline synchronous script in `<head>` in Base.astro: checks localStorage.getItem('theme') first, then window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches as fallback, adds `.dark` class to document.documentElement when appropriate
Script uses `is:inline` directive to prevent Astro from bundling as module
Script runs synchronously (no defer, no type='module') so it executes before first paint
No flash on hard refresh (Cmd+Shift+R) in both light OS mode and dark OS mode
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create ThemeToggle component
userStories.description: As a user, I want a toggle button that shows the current theme and lets me switch between light and dark modes.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `src/components/ThemeToggle.astro` with button containing sun icon (13x13 SVG), moon icon (13x24 SVG), and label span
Sun icon visible (not hidden) in dark mode, Moon icon hidden in dark mode
Moon icon visible (not hidden) in light mode, Sun icon hidden in light mode
Label shows 'light' in dark mode, 'dark' in light mode
Button uses Tailwind classes: flex items-center gap-2 bg-bg-surface border border-stroke rounded text-fg-muted px-2 py-1 text-xs font-mono cursor-pointer hover:text-fg transition-colors
Button has data-theme-toggle attribute, Sun icon has data-icon-sun, Moon icon has data-icon-moon, label has data-theme-label
Script uses `is:inline` to prevent Astro deduplication (component rendered twice)
Script queries elements via `document.currentScript.previousElementSibling.querySelector('[data-*]')` for scoped queries (no id attributes)

Click handler toggles `.dark` class on document.documentElement, calls localStorage.setItem('theme', isDark ? 'dark' : 'light'), syncs all toggle instances via document.querySelectorAll('[data-theme-toggle]'), calls window.closeMenu() if available
syncUI() function aligns icon/label with current theme on load by checking document.documentElement.classList.contains('dark')
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Integrate ThemeToggle into navigation
userStories.description: As a user, I want to access the theme toggle from both the desktop navigation and mobile menu drawer.
acceptanceCriteria: Import ThemeToggle.astro in Nav.astro frontmatter block
Render `<ThemeToggle />` as last item in desktop nav link row (after Contact link, inside the flex row)
Render `` at bottom of mobile drawer (after last nav link ``, before closing `` of dropdown)
Expose `closeMenu` function on `window` in Nav's existing script block (add `window.closeMenu = closeMenu;` after function definition)
ThemeToggle appears in both desktop nav and mobile drawer
Clicking toggle in mobile drawer closes drawer and switches theme
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Verify theme persistence and OS preference
userStories.description: As a user, I want my theme choice to persist across sessions, and I want the site to respect my OS preference on first visit.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify localStorage.setItem('theme', 'dark') stores value when clicking toggle to dark mode
Verify localStorage.setItem('theme', 'light') stores value when clicking toggle to light mode
Verify localStorage.getItem('theme') retrieves stored value on page load
Verify with no localStorage value: dark OS preference loads dark mode on first visit
Verify with no localStorage value: light OS preference loads light mode on first visit
Verify with stored value 'light': loads light mode regardless of OS preference
Verify with stored value 'dark': loads dark mode regardless of OS preference
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Performance - theme switch under 50ms
userStories.description: As a user, I want the theme switch to feel instant when I click the toggle button.
acceptanceCriteria: Measure time from toggle click to visual theme change using Chrome DevTools Performance panel (record, click toggle, inspect frame timing)
Switch completes within 50ms from click event to visual theme change on desktop Chrome
Switch completes within 50ms from click event to visual theme change on mobile Chrome DevTools emulation (device toolbar)
No layout shift (Cumulative Layout Shift = 0) during theme transition
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Cross-browser compatibility
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to verify the feature works on modern desktop and mobile browsers.
acceptanceCriteria: Feature works on Chrome (latest) — toggle switches theme, no flash, localStorage persists
Feature works on Firefox (latest) — toggle switches theme, no flash, localStorage persists
Feature works on Safari (latest) — toggle switches theme, no flash, localStorage persists
Feature works on mobile Safari iOS — toggle switches theme, no flash, localStorage persists
Feature works on mobile Chrome Android — toggle switches theme, no flash, localStorage persists
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
